input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Aleph Systems addressed to CTO. There is a separate thread with CFO. Do NOT reference or CC CFO.

dimensions.name: no_secondary_contact
dimensions.check: 'cfo' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cc' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'copy' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-022] Technical thread (CTO). CFO mention = ICP misroute risk.
